EmailTemplate.description: Used by the lease management review email process
EmailTemplate.name: Lease Management Review
EmailTemplate.subject: PFM Review Complete | {!leaseworks__Claims__c.Associated_Contract__c} | {!leaseworks__Claims__c.Unique_Claim_Number__c}
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi Lease Management Team,
The above-named claim has now been approved by PFM
Link – {!leaseworks__Claims__c.Link}
Regards,
Portfolio & Fund Management
